description: Train an SVM classifier in JASP using the 'BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv' dataset to predict 'Gender' from the five personality traits (Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, and Openness). Use an 80/20 training/test data split with a seed of 12345 and an RBF kernel. Ensure the Confusion Matrix (Test set), ROC Curve, and Performance metrics (AUC) are enabled in the output. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/SVM_Gender_Analysis.jasp. Record the Test Set AUC value and the counts of True Positives and True Negatives from the Test Set Confusion Matrix in /home/ga/Documents/JASP/svm_performance_report.txt.
